author: Her

capabilities.description: Discover tools exposed by a local MCP HTTP JSON-RPC bridge through tools/list.

url.description: Local MCP HTTP JSON-RPC bridge endpoint, such as http://localhost:8765/jsonrpc.

capabilities.title: Discover MCP tools

description: Inspects local MCP bridge endpoints so vibe-coded plugins can target real tool names and schemas.
name: MCP Bridge
systemPromptAddendum: Use mcp.discover before creating MCP plugins when the user provides a local bridge URL but not an exact tool name.
